{{Quote|Guess your daddy's been gone too long, boy. You need someone to beat some sense back into you!|Gerd, to Dessel|<ref name="PoD" />}}
'''Gerd''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] who lived during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Sith Wars]]. Gerd worked in a [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Mining/Legends|mine]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]], where he stayed for nearly twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. He was good friends with a miner named [[Hurst]] and often bullied Hurst's son, [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]]. In [[1003 BBY]], Gerd, drunk on [[Corellian whiskey/Legends|Corellian whiskey]], got into a fight with Dessel over the right to mine a cortosis vein. Even though Dessel was tired from working six [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] in the mines, he defeated Gerd after having a flash of [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Precognition/Legends|precognition]]. Dessel anticipated one of Gerd's attempted strikes and bit off the man's thumb.

==Biography==
Gerd, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]], worked in an [[Outer Rim Oreworks Company]] [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Mining/Legends|mine]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]] nearly a millennia prior to the [[Declaration of a New Order|fall]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During his time at the mine, Gerd became good friends with another miner named [[Hurst]]. Hurst's son, [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]], began working in the mines at age thirteen. He was often tormented and bullied by some of the bigger, stronger miners, Gerd included. However, the bullying eventually stopped when Dessel grew older and became just as strong as the others. In [[1008 BBY]], Hurst [[Death/Legends|died]] of a massive heart attack, leaving Gerd as one of the more senior miners in the Outer Rim Oreworks mine. By [[1003 BBY]], Gerd had worked in the mine for nearly twenty years, and the physical toil of working in the mines had turned his body into a mass of hard, knotted muscle. Due to debt accrued over his time working for Outer Rim Oreworks, Gerd, like many others, was stuck working in the mines until he could get enough money to pay them off.<ref name="PoD" />

In 1003 BBY, on the five-year anniversary of Hurst's death, Gerd went to work for his six-hour shift in the mines while he was drunk on sour [[Corellian whiskey/Legends|Corellian whiskey]]. He came across Dessel working a cortosis vein deep in the mine, and saw the man's mining equipment fail. As the custom in the mine was that someone else was allowed to move in on a vein if the being currently mining it stopped working, Gerd ordered Dessel to move out of the way. When Dessel didn't budge, Gerd berated Dessel for having no respect for his father by not referring to him as "Dad." Dessel tried to ignore Gerd, but the argument quickly turned into a fistfight when Gerd tried to force Dessel to move. Dessel, who was tired from working in the mines, was able to gain the upper hand on Gerd, flipping him to the ground, but he quickly collapsed due to sheer exhaustion.<ref name="PoD" />

Gerd taunted Dessel for trying to fight after having worked six hours in the mines, but Dessel was able to get up, and their combat turned into a wrestling match on the mine floor. Gerd obtained the upper hand this time, and attempted to gouge one of Dessel's [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] out. However, Gerd's opponent had a flash of [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Precognition/Legends|precognition]], allowing Dessel to sense what Gerd was going to do before he did it. Dessel anticipated Gerd's move, and bit off Gerd's thumb, ending the fight. The on-site [[Medic/Legends|medic]] was able to reattach Gerd's thumb with a [[vibroscalpel]] and [[Synthflesh/Legends|synthflesh]], and with [[Kolto/Legends|kolto]] treatments, he was able to return to work within a few days. Dessel was suspended without pay until Gerd was healed and returned to work. Dessel would soon leave Apatros and join the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Army/Legends|army]] fighting in the [[New Sith Wars]] against the Republic. Dessel later became Darth Bane, one of the most important and influential [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|history]].<ref name="PoD" />

==Personality and traits==
Gerd was a callous man, one who did not have problems bullying and tormenting a thirteen-year-old boy like Dessel. [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] whiskey was a favorite of Gerd's, and he was drunk on it when he fought Dessel. He was good friends with Hurst and was angered when Dessel disrespected his friend.<ref name="PoD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gerd appeared in [[Drew Karpyshyn]]'s novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', published in [[2006]].<ref name="PoD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
